content_body:
Winter 2025 is for finally bringing your ultimate North Georgia girls' trip plans out of the group chat and into the Appalachian Mountains. If you and your best friends are looking to escape and enjoy a memorable getaway, Blue Ridge is the perfect place for peace and pampering. 

Just two hours north of Atlanta, Blue Ridge boasts a variety of activities from wellness treatments to retail therapy and fine dining to outdoor activities. No matter the personality types in your girl gang, here’s how to plan the ideal girls’ trip for winter 2025.

The Cabins:

First, the most pressing item to reserve is your own private luxury cabin in Blue Ridge, GA. Over the past 20 years, Cabin Rentals of Georgia has provided top-of-the-line accommodations to many girls' trips. Our North Georgia luxury cabins boast fully-stocked kitchens for preparing meals together, SMART TVs for streaming your favorite chick-flicks, and pristine hot tubs for maximizing relaxation. 

To ensure that your group can secure all the amenities you desire, we recommend reserving your Blue Ridge vacation rental in advance. Our professional reservation specialists are happy to guide your group towards a property that boasts what you are looking for! 

Take a trip down memory lane and gain inspiration from girls' trips past: 

Awesome girls' trip weekend! Cabin was the perfect layout for our group. Loved the curved sofa for socializing in the evenings. Beautiful views and convenient location to all of our adventures. Beds were very comfortable and sheets were soft. Views were very nice from all rooms, not just the main living room. All in all Serendipity is a beautiful home! ~ Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

Girls Weekend for Dawn's Fabulous 50th Birthday!! We enjoyed the great views, hot tub, hiking, shopping, eating, and laughs. Friends from different times of life came together to celebrate a wonderful friend. Thank you for everything! Enjoy the memories you will make here! ~ Above the Timberline

My friends and I came up for a weekend girls trip and we had a blast! The cabin is beautiful, and the views are breathtaking. We took advantage of the swing and enjoyed both sunrises and sunsets under a bundle of blankets. We took a drive and hiked Long Creek Falls, which ended with a beautiful waterfall. overall, such an incredible and relaxing trip! We will be back! ~ Cohutta Sunset

The Dining: 

Offering a variety of dining options, Blue Ridge prides itself on a diverse culinary scene. There’s no better way to begin a day of adventures than with coffee and a breakfast sandwich at Mountain Mama’s Coffee Lounge. Priding on its warm ambiance, coastal-cowgirl influence, and locally roasted coffee, take a moment and enjoy the morning here before embarking on your fun-filled day. Try their seasonal latte flavors and signature bagels for a true Mountain Mama's experience.

For an unforgettable Italian meal, reserve a table at Ferraro’s to celebrate your weekend away in the mountains. Their handmade pastas and wine selection are perfect for a cozy winter evening.

Keeping with the comfort food, another must-visit is The Pasta Market, where fresh, flavorful dishes meet boutique dining. Don’t forget to order their signature lasagna or a delectable flatbread—you won’t be disappointed.

For a casual Sunday brunch, check out General Ledger! Located in a historic bank building, you can even reserve the vault to experience a unique atmosphere during your meal. The intimate atmosphere and tasty Southern cuisine makes it the ideal spot to toast to friendship and new memories.

The Sweet Treats:

What would a girls' trip be without a little sugar, spice, and everything nice? Pick up a dozen cupcakes from The Sweet Shoppe to enjoy at your cabin after an exciting day of exploration. These winners of Food Network’s Cupcake Wars will satisfy any craving from decadent cupcakes to gourmet desserts.

For those looking to experience more of a dessert dining experience, visit Mona Lisa’s Dessert House after dinner at one of the above restaurants. Pair decadent desserts made from scratch with an extravagant craft cocktail for a delightful end to your evening.

The Libations: 

Keep your insides warm this winter with a delicious drink from one of Blue Ridge's bars! Head to Hook and Eye for a beautiful birds' eye view of Blue Ridge and enjoy signature Blue Ridge-themed cocktails while waiting for your dinner reservation. Located in the heart of town, this cozy, upscale bar is perfect for casual conversations and laughter with friends.

For those exploring nearby McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN, visit Bar 21, a swanky cocktail lounge known for its innovative drinks and lively atmosphere. Whether you’re in the mood for a classic martini or a seasonal craft cocktail, their menu has something for everyone.

Blue Ridge’s wine scene is another staple of the region. Spend an afternoon at Roo Mountain Vineyards in Ellijay, where you can sip award-winning wines while enjoying panoramic views of the surrounding mountains. Their cozy tasting room and friendly staff make it a favorite among visitors and locals alike.

Another standout is Engelheim Vineyards, known for its German-inspired wines and welcoming atmosphere. Gather your group for a tasting session and toast to your unforgettable girls’ trip while surrounded by natural beauty! 

The Relaxation: 

A girls’ trip isn’t complete without a little pampering, and Blue Ridge is home to several incredible spa experiences. Begin your journey at Teatree’s Boutique Spa, where you can indulge in luxurious treatments like hot stone massages, hydrating facials, and aromatherapy. Their serene ambiance will melt away all your stress and set the tone for a relaxing getaway. 

For a more personalized experience, book an in-cabin massage. Many local therapists bring their services directly to your vacation rental, allowing you and your friends to enjoy a spa day without stepping out into the cold. Pair this with a cozy fire and some wine, and you have the recipe for ultimate R&R.

If you’re looking to stay active while finding inner tranquility, check out Yoga Over Blue Ridge. This serene yoga studio offers variety of rejuvenating classes to recenter your mind, body, and spirit while in the mountains.

The Boutiques:

Retail therapy is a must on any girls’ getaway, and Blue Ridge’s boutique shopping scene does not disappoint. Start at Paradise Beauty Company, a haven for clean beauty enthusiasts. Stock up on skincare essentials, Christian self-care workbooks, and hair care products to continue the pampering at home.

Next, head to Canoe, a stylish boutique offering an array of chic clothing, jewelry, and home goods. It’s the perfect spot to pick up a stylish keepsake or a gift for someone special.

Finally, stop by Blue Ridge Cotton Company for a unique Blue Ridge keepsake while supporting worthy causes. BRCC chooses a different charity each month to donate a percentage of their sales to, and their array of jewelry, journals, Blue Ridge memorabilia, and more offers the perfect inventory to close out your shopping day.

The Indoors: 

Blue Ridge has its gray days, but never fear! If you’re looking for some indoor fun, downtown Blue Ridge has you covered. Visit the Blue Ridge Mountains Arts Association, where you can explore local artwork, rotating exhibits, and even participate in hands-on workshops. Their events are a popular staple in the area, so make sure to check out their calendar when planning your trip.

For group bonding, try solving puzzles and mysteries together at Escape Blue Ridge. Their themed escape rooms are a fantastic activity for groups and perfect for colder days.

Finally, don’t miss a live performance at the Blue Ridge Community Theater. Whether it’s a play, musical, or seasonal event, this beloved theater offers a delightful way to spend an evening with your friends while enjoying some of the local talent Blue Ridge prides itself on.

The Outdoors: 

While in the North Georgia Mountains, hiking is an absolute must for your girls' trip itinerary, winter weather permitting. Start with a hike to the iconic The Swinging Bridge, where you’ll be rewarded with stunning views of the Toccoa River while planted on the suspension bridge. This short trail is perfect for a morning adventure and offers plenty of photo opportunities.

For those seeking waterfalls, head to Fall Branch Falls or make the trek to Brasstown Bald, Georgia’s highest peak. Both destinations provide breathtaking winter landscapes that are worth the effort.

For a special winter activity, book a trail ride with Cowgirl Up Stables or North Georgia Equestrian Tours. Both options offer guided tours through scenic North Georgia trails, allowing you to soak in the beauty of the Blue Ridge mountains while creating lasting memories with your gal pals.

The Perfect Girls’ Trip Awaits

Filled with opportunities for relaxation, adventure, and connection, Blue Ridge, Georgia, is the ultimate winter destination to reunite your girlfriends. With its dynamic blend of charming boutiques, fine dining, and panoramic mountain views, Blue Ridge offers something for everyone. So, gather your friends, pack your bags, and prepare for a getaway that will spark an annual tradition!
title: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun: Preparing the Ideal Girls' Trip in Blue Ridge
